description: Self-reported ancestry (up to two selections).
enums: English | Irish | Scottish | Chinese | Italian | German | Aboriginal | Torres Strait Islander | Australian | Other 1 | Other 2

description: Highest level of formal education completed.
enums: Postgraduate degree | Honours Bachelor degree/Graduate diploma/Graduate certificate | Bachelor degree but not Honours | TAFE diploma/TAFE advanced diploma/TAFE graduate diploma | TAFE certificate 3 or 4 | TAFE certificate 1 or 2 | Year 12 or equivalent | Year 11 or equivalent | Year 9, 10, or equivalent | Year 7, 8, or equivalent | Finished primary school | Did not finish primary school | No schooling | Other

description: Current relationship or marital status.
enums: Single | Married, or living with a partner (de facto) | Divorced or separated | Widow/widower | Have a partner but not living together | Other

description: Classification of current place of residence by urbanisation level.
enums: Rural or semi-rural | Regional city or town | Suburban | Urban fringe | Central business district

description: Self-assessed ability to manage on available income.
enums: Easily | Not too bad | Difficult some of the time | Difficult all of the time | Impossible

description: Current employment or occupational situation. Multiple selections allowed.
enums: In paid employment or self-employed | Retired | Looking after home and/or family | Unable to work because of illness or disability | Unemployed | Doing unpaid or voluntary work | Full or part-time student | None of the above

description: Total number of people living in the household including the participant.
Whether the participant has a pet living in their home.
enums: No | Yes

description: Average of three standing height measurements in centimetres.
Average of three weight measurements in kilograms.
Body mass index derived from average weight (kg) divided by average height (m) squared.
Broad condition categories the participant has ever been diagnosed with by a doctor or health professional.
enums: Autoimmune disorder | Blood disorders (Anaemia) | Cancer | Digestive system or liver problems | Endocrine, nutritional and metabolic disorders (e.g., diabetes, thyroid disorder, vitamin deficiencies) | Eye or visual problems | Fractures, breaks, or joint problems | Heart or circulatory disease (e.g., high blood pressure or stroke) | Kidney or urinary system disorders | Lung or respiratory problems | Mental health conditions (e.g.depression, bipolar disorder) | Neurodevelopmental conditions (e.g., Autism spectrum disorder, ADHD) | Neurological disorders (things that affect that brain or nervous system) | Reproductive health conditions | Other not listed | None of the above | I don't know | Prefer not to answer

description: Whether the participant reports having hay fever or allergic rhinitis.
enums: No | Yes | Do not know

description: Whether the participant has been identified as gluten intolerant or diagnosed with coeliac disease.
enums: No | Yes, gluten intolerant | Yes, coeliac | Unsure

description: Self-reported food allergies. Multiple selections allowed.
enums: I have no food allergies that I know of | Peanuts | Tree nuts | Seafood (fish or shellfish) | Dairy | Wheat | Eggs | Soy | Other

description: How the participant was delivered at birth.
enums: Vaginal/Natural Birth | Caesarean section | Don't know

description: Primary feeding method during infancy.
enums: Primarily breastmilk | Primarily infant formula | A mixture of breastmilk and formula | Don't know

description: Current frequency of use of tobacco or smoking implements (cigarettes, cigars, pipes, hookah, etc.).
enums: Never | Less than once a month | Several times a month but less than once a week | Once a week | Several times a week but not daily | Daily

description: Current frequency of e-cigarette or vape use.
enums: Never | Seldom | Several times a month | Once a week | Several times a week | Every day

description: How often the participant consumes a drink containing alcohol (AUDIT question 1).
enums: Never | Monthly or Less | 2 to 4 times a month | 2 to 3 times a week | 4 or more times a week | Prefer not to answer

description: Usual time spent outside per day in activities such as gardening, parks, hiking, cycling, swimming.
enums: Less than one hour per week (10 minutes or less a day) | 1-3 hours per week (10-30 minutes each day) | 3-6 hours per week (31-60 minutes each day) | 7-14 hours per week (1-2 hours each day) | 14-28 hours per week (2-4 hours each day) | More than 28 hours per week (4 or more hours each day)

description: Daily hours spent in front of a screen for leisure activities (TV, computer, tablet, mobile), excluding work. Slider 0-20.
enums: SLIDER: 0 | 10 | 20 hours

description: Frequency of shift work in current or most recent employment.
enums: Never/rarely | Sometimes | Usually | Always

description: Walking time from home to the nearest green or natural space.
enums: Fewer than 5 minutes | 5-9 minutes | 10-19 minutes | 20-30 minutes | More than 30 minutes | No green space/too far to walk

description: How often the participant visits friends or family or has them visit.
enums: Daily or almost daily | 2-4 times a week | About once a week | About once a month | Once every few months | Never or almost never | No friends or family outside household

description: General classification of the participant's usual dietary pattern.
enums: I eat anything with no or few exclusions (omnivore) | I eat anything except red meat | I eat some meat, but mostly have a vegetable diet (flexitarian) | Vegetarian | Vegetarian but eat seafood (pescatarian) | Vegan | Other | Prefer not to say

description: Self-assessed healthiness of diet based on participant's own understanding of healthy eating.
enums: Almost always healthy | Healthy more often than unhealthy | Healthy about half the time | Unhealthy more often than healthy | Almost always unhealthy | Prefer not to answer

description: Self-rated overall quality of life (WHOQOL-BREF question 1).
enums: Very poor | Poor | Neither poor nor good | Good | Very good

description: Satisfaction with sleep quality (SATED sleep health questionnaire).
enums: Rarely/Never | Sometimes | Usually/Always

description: How often the participant feels isolated from others (Three-Item Loneliness Scale).
enums: Hardly ever or never | Some of the time | Often | Prefer not to answer
